detectors.description: MiniMeToken.isContract(address) (MiniMeToken.sol#1033-1047) is declared view but contains assembly code
detectors.markdown: [MiniMeToken.isContract(address)](MiniMeToken.sol#L1033-L1047) is declared view but contains assembly code

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (MiniMeToken.sol#499-535):
	External calls:
	- ! TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount) (MiniMeToken.sol#521)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount (MiniMeToken.sol#529)
	MiniMeToken.allowed (MiniMeToken.sol#219) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address) (MiniMeToken.sol#549-555)
	- MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256) (MiniMeToken.sol#499-535)
	- MiniMeToken.approveAndCall(address,uint256,bytes) (MiniMeToken.sol#573-613)
	- MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256) (MiniMeToken.sol#353-383)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](MiniMeToken.sol#L499-L535):
	External calls:
	- [! TokenController(controller).onApprove(msg.sender,_spender,_amount)](MiniMeToken.sol#L521)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [allowed[msg.sender][_spender] = _amount](MiniMeToken.sol#L529)
	[MiniMeToken.allowed](MiniMeToken.sol#L219) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [MiniMeToken.allowance(address,address)](MiniMeToken.sol#L549-L555)
	- [MiniMeToken.approve(address,uint256)](MiniMeToken.sol#L499-L535)
	- [MiniMeToken.approveAndCall(address,uint256,bytes)](MiniMeToken.sol#L573-L613)
	- [MiniMeToken.transferFrom(address,address,uint256)](MiniMeToken.sol#L353-L383)

detectors.description:

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.createCloneToken(string,uint8,string,uint256,bool) (MiniMeToken.sol#791-835):
	External calls:
	- cloneToken = tokenFactory.createCloneToken(this,_snapshotBlock,_cloneTokenName,_cloneDecimalUnits,_cloneTokenSymbol,_transfersEnabled) (MiniMeToken.sol#807-821)
	- cloneToken.changeController(msg.sender) (MiniMeToken.sol#825)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- NewCloneToken(address(cloneToken),_snapshotBlock) (MiniMeToken.sol#831)

	External calls:
	- [cloneToken = tokenFactory.createCloneToken(this,_snapshotBlock,_cloneTokenName,_cloneDecimalUnits,_cloneTokenSymbol,_transfersEnabled)](MiniMeToken.sol#L807-L821)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MiniMeToken.doTransfer(address,address,uint256) (MiniMeToken.sol#399-471):
	External calls:
	- previousBalanceFrom = balanceOfAt(_from,block.number) (MiniMeToken.sol#423)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,parentSnapShotBlock) (MiniMeToken.sol#679)
	- ! TokenController(controller).onTransfer(_from,_to,_amount) (MiniMeToken.sol#437)
	- previousBalanceTo = balanceOfAt(_to,block.number) (MiniMeToken.sol#457)
		- parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,parentSnapShotBlock) (MiniMeToken.sol#679)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- Transfer(_from,_to,_amount) (MiniMeToken.sol#465)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MiniMeToken.doTransfer(address,address,uint256)](MiniMeToken.sol#L399-L471):

	- [previousBalanceFrom = balanceOfAt(_from,block.number)](MiniMeToken.sol#L423)
		- [parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,parentSnapShotBlock)](MiniMeToken.sol#L679)
	- [! TokenController(controller).onTransfer(_from,_to,_amount)](MiniMeToken.sol#L437)
	- [previousBalanceTo = balanceOfAt(_to,block.number)](MiniMeToken.sol#L457)
		- [parentToken.balanceOfAt(_owner,parentSnapShotBlock)](MiniMeToken.sol#L679)
	Event emitted after the call(s):
	- [Transfer(_from,_to,_amount)](MiniMeToken.sol#L465)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.6 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- NestedArrayFunctionCallDecoder
	- ZeroFunctionSelector
	- DelegateCallReturnValue
	- ECRecoverMalformedInput
	- SkipEmptyStringLiteral
	- ConstantOptimizerSubtraction
	- IdentityPrecompileReturnIgnored.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.6 (MiniMeToken.sol#1)

	- ECRecoverMalformedInput
